# .github

## Purpose

This directory contains GitHub repository templates, CI/CD pipeline automation workflows, and automated governance configurations.

---

## 📂 Structure

- `workflows/ci.yml` — Automated CI matrix for monorepo linting, type checking, unit testing, and build verification.
- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` (planned) — Bug report and feature request templates.
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` (planned) — Pull request submission checklist and review template.
